description: You are a Clinical Data Manager/Medical Coder for the Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry (CV-REG-2023). In OpenClinica (login: root / Admin123!), address the open discrepancy notes for subjects CV-101, CV-102, and CV-103. Using the coding dictionary provided at /home/ga/meddra_extract.csv, identify the MedDRA LLT numeric codes for the reported symptoms. Update each note so its status is no longer 'New', ensuring your resolution response contains the exact numeric code from the dictionary.
